# Agent Economy

Curated news and insights about AI agents and the autonomous economy.

## Website Overview

- **URL**: https://agenteconomy.cn
- **Language**: Bilingual (English / Chinese)
- **Topic**: AI agents, agent economy, autonomous systems

## Pages

### Home
- **URL**: https://agenteconomy.cn
- **Description**: Homepage listing latest articles about AI agents and the autonomous economy.

### Articles
- **URL**: https://agenteconomy.cn/blog/
- **Description**: All published articles.

### About
- **URL**: https://agenteconomy.cn/about
- **Description**: About Agent Economy blog.

### RSS Feed
- **URL**: https://agenteconomy.cn/rss.xml
- **Description**: RSS feed for article updates.

## Recent Articles

### English
1. **Arm AGI CPU: Silicon for the Agentic AI Cloud Era**
   - URL: https://agenteconomy.cn/blog/arm-agi-cpu
   - Description: Arm's first self-developed data center chip for agentic AI infrastructure.

2. **Playbit: A Personal-Scale Software Platform**
   - URL: https://agenteconomy.cn/blog/playbit-personal-software-platform
   - Description: A software runtime enabling anyone to create apps for themselves and loved ones.

3. **Project NOMAD: Free Open-Source Offline AI Server**
   - URL: https://agenteconomy.cn/blog/project-nomad-offline-ai-server
   - Description: Free open-source offline server to run AI on your own computer.

### 中文
1. **Arm 推出 AGI CPU：面向智能体 AI 时代的数据中心芯片**
   - URL: https://agenteconomy.cn/blog/arm-agi-cpu
   - Description: Arm 首款自研数据中心芯片，专为智能体 AI 基础设施设计。

2. **Playbit：面向个人的软件运行时**
   - URL: https://agenteconomy.cn/blog/playbit-personal-software-platform
   - Description: 让任何人都能创建供自己或亲友使用的应用。

3. **Project NOMAD：免费开源的离线 AI 服务器**
   - URL: https://agenteconomy.cn/blog/project-nomad-offline-ai-server
   - Description: 免费开源的离线服务器，让任何人在自己电脑上运行完整 AI 系统。

## Topics Covered

- AI Agents and Agentic AI
- Agent Interoperability (A2A, MCP)
- AI Hardware and Infrastructure
- Agent Economy and Business Models
- AI Security and Trust
- Cross-platform Development
- Local/Offline AI

- GitHub: https://github.com/lvterry/agent-economy-blog
